title: Fix askStream() to use runAgentLoopStream instead of legacy agenticAsk
description: askStream() in src/ask.ts delegates to legacy agenticAsk which doesn't support customProvider or runAgentLoopStream. Need to rewrite askStream() to use runAgentLoopStream from agentic-core. Also fix agentic-core build to export runAgentLoopStream properly. Tester found 10/12 ask-stream tests fail because mock providers are ignored.
